title: pelargonium × calocephalon
intro: Pelargonium × calocephalon, also known as Mountain Rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, which is a hybrid of two South African species of Pelargonium. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds with antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × calocephalon include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
